title: ageratina paramensis
intro: Ageratina paramensis, also known as Pan de Árbol, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina paramensis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating fever, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to various health conditions.
